item.title: lencx/ChatGPT
item.description: 🔮 ChatGPT Desktop Application (Mac, Windows and Linux)

item.title: CodeEditApp/CodeEdit
item.description: CodeEdit App for macOS – Elevate your code editing experience. Open source, free forever.

item.description: Fully featured, open source, privacy friendly email app for Android

item.title: Shabinder/SpotiFlyer
item.description: Kotlin Multiplatform Music Downloader, Supports Spotify / Gaana / Youtube Music / Jio Saavn / SoundCloud.

item.title: arran4/send-to-google-photos
item.description: A desktop utility to help easily upload files to google photos from what ever shell
